subject: Re: Cerberus Capital
body:
what boat is it


----- Original Message ----
From: Craig <Craig@penumbramarine.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, September 7, 2007 7:49:50 PM
Subject: RE: Cerberus Capital


The boat or the transmission?
 
Regards,
 
Craig Tafoya
Penumbra Marine Logistics
(954) 328-6203
http://www.CraigTafoya.com
 



From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Friday, September 07, 2007 7:41 PM
To: Craig@PenumbraMarine.com
Subject: Re: Cerberus Capital
 
what is this
----- Original Message ----
From: Craig <Craig@penumbramarine.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, September 7, 2007 6:59:04 PM
Subject: Cerberus Capital
Jeffrey,
 
Attached is a new patent of a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT), or what I call an Infinitely Variable Transmission. I sent this out to Ford Motor Company soon after I received the patent. This past April they patented one that is almost identical.
 
Cerberus Capital now owns most of Chrysler. I see that Chrysler is probably the last manufacturer that does not have a CVT and is still using 40 year old transmissions.  Do you know of anyone in particular I could send this to at Cerberus Capital?
 
BTW – I was at Nautica inspecting the tender for Roman Abramovich’s yacht. While I was there, Franco told me you are now interested in an outboard version and 50mph is not important anymore.
 
Have you seen this?
 

 
Kindest Regards,
 
Craig Tafoya
 (954) 328-6203
